Targeted at athletes and fitness enthusiasts, the packaging emphasizes convenience and race-ready use, reinforcing its niche positioning in the performance nutrition market.

Item Name: O'Creme Peony Gumpaste Flower, Set of 3 - Edible Flowers for Cake Decorating - Sugar Paste Flower Decorations for Cakes, Cupcake Toppers - Birthday Party, Wedding, Valentines Day (Pink) Bullet Point 1: BEAUTIFUL EDIBLE SUGAR PASTE FLOWERS - Set of 3, our edible flowers are made with petals of 100% edible sugar paste (gumpaste). The petals are attached to non-edible wire stems and artificial stamens that complete the realistic appearance. Add a splash of color to your baked goods! Bullet Point 2: ADD A TOUCH OF MAGIC TO CAKES & CONFECTIONS - Elevating the ordinary into something truly extraordinary. Intricately patterned and delicately shaped, our elegant edible blossoms add a flowery touch of eye-catching magic to your cakes, cupcakes, and confections. Bullet Point 3: HIGHLY DETAILED WITH LIFELIKE REALISM - Peony measures inch, the vibrant flowers feature details such as veined flower petals, ruffled petal edges, coloring and shading, varied petal layers and detailed centers for professional results that are next to impossible to replicate at home. Bullet Point 4: KOSHER HIGH QUALITY INGREDIENTS - Kosher Certified. Our high quality edible petals are carefully crafted from confectioners sugar, egg white powder, distilled water, corn starch, CMC powder and food coloring. Made with love for you and your loved ones to enjoy on a special day. Bullet Point 5: READY TO USE: SAVES YOU TIME AND EFFORT - Made with the same care you'd give your start-from-scratch gumpaste cake decorating flowers, but ours save you time. Turn basic to beautiful! Perfect for weddings, birthdays, anniversaries, baby showers or any upscale event. Product Description:

Elevate basic baked goods into elegant and flowery works of art with O’Creme Edible Gumpaste Flowers. The petals are edible, pre-cut, and ready to use on cakes, cupcakes, and assorted confections (other parts including wire stems and artificial stamens are for decorative purposes only). They’re a super cute way to add a splash of color and texture that will leave guests wide-eyed in awe and admiration.

PRODUCT FEATURES:

SET OF 3 Peony Flowers

Peony measures inch

• Edible Sugar Paste (Gumpaste)
• Highly Detailed and Lifelike
• Made In A Nut-Free Facility
• Store in A Cool, Dry Place
• Kosher Certified

O’Creme’s vibrant assortment of colorful blossoms are perfect for weddings, birthdays, anniversaries, graduation, quinceañera, tropical & Hawaiian theme, springtime meadow theme, summer wildflower theme and so much more! They’re small enough to make mini bouquets that look amazing on a 3-tier cake, or place single flowers atop cupcakes.

CRAFTED TO A HIGHER STANDARD OF QUALITY

Unlike other edible flowers made from dry rice starch paper, ours are both ornamental AND deliciously edible. Because let’s be honest – who wants to bite into stiff, wet paper? We use sugar paste (gumpaste) which is a sweet and stable mix of confectioners sugar, egg white powder, distilled water, corn starch and CMC powder that dries hard and holds its shape. You can cover a cake for decoration with no reduction in sweetness. And no need to spend extra time folding paper flowers for a 3D effect!

EASY TO APPLY AND DECORATE

The difficulty is beginner level, but the results are stunning and professional. O’Creme edible flowers will be the talk of the party!

Value: 3.0 Unit: Count
overall_summary: Niche specialty product targeting cake decorators and event planners with a focus on aesthetics and edibility. Positioned as a premium alternative to dry rice starch flowers due to its sugar paste composition, offering better texture and mouthfeel. The set size (3 flowers) and detailed craftsmanship justify a higher price point compared to basic flower decorations, catering to weddings, birthdays, and upscale events where presentation is key.
